nasb.text: Here is wisdom. Let him who has understanding calculate the number of the beast, for the number is that of a man; and his number is six hundred and sixty-six.

esv.text: This calls for wisdom: let the one who has understanding calculate the number of the beast, for it is the number of a man, and his number is 666.

cnv.text: 在這裡要有智慧。有悟性的人，就讓他計算獸的數字，因為這是人的數字，它的數字是六百六十六。

ccb.text: 这里藏有玄机，聪明的人可以计算那怪兽的代号，因为那是一个人的代号，是“六百六十六”。

csbs.text: 智慧就在这里。有理性的人应当计算这兽的数目，因为这是一个人的数目；其数目是六百六十六。
